source bytes: 16211 compressed bytes: 5034 symbols: 60 chunk bytes per symbol: 84 source sha256: 6aa05bbd6ca3500e99ed6594acb3ec23032b6f7a587eae6ac3d9a6a6735ed447 compressed sha256: 37d62dca68178d68687b8594bbc120ea09406093ded7caf6755ef068fb93ee51 This is a deterministic 27×27 Aztec-style lattice series derived from Composition.hs. Bull's-eye and mode ring are fixed by rule. The payload area carries zlib-compressed file bytes. Each symbol encodes one chunk. The mode ring carries symbol index and total count.
